chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Crl.Tansfer Appln.No.S-68 of 2021. _____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ________________________________________________________ 01. For orders on office objection “A”. 02. For hearing of main case. 01.11.2021 Mr. Habibullah Ghouri, Advocate for the applicants. Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Addl.P.G for the State. = * = * = * = * = * = 1. Urgency Granted. 2. It is contended by learned counsel for the applicants that the applicants on due investigation were let off by the police by placing their names in Column No.2 of the challan sheet, they were joined in trial by learned 1st Judicial Magistrate, Mehar, and they are apprehending danger to their lives at the hands of complainant party while attending the Magisterial Court at Mehar. Learned Addl.P.G for the State has sought for dismissal of instant transfer application by contending that it is premature. I have considered the above arguments and perused the record. Apparently, a case against the applicants is pending for inquiry before Magistrate having jurisdiction, its transfer to be sought when it is sent up to the Court of Session. The instant criminal transfer application is disposed of in above terms. J U D G E
